sentences.arabic: تَنَاوُلُ الْخُضْرَاوَاتِ وَالْفَوَاكِهِ يَوْمِيًّا مُهِمٌّ جِدًّا لِلْجِسْمِ.
sentences.translation: Konzumiranje povrća i voća svakodnevno je veoma važno za tijelo.
sentences.translationEn: Eating vegetables and fruits daily is very important for the body.

sentences.arabic: هِيَ تَمُدُّنَا بِالْفِيتَامِينَاتِ وَالْمَعَادِنِ اللَّازِمَةِ لِلنُّمُوِّ.
sentences.translation: Ono nas opskrbljuje vitaminima i mineralima potrebnim za rast.
sentences.translationEn: It provides us with the vitamins and minerals necessary for growth.

sentences.arabic: يَجِبُ أَنْ نَتَجَنَّبَ أَكْلَ السُّكَّرِ بِكَثْرَةٍ لِنُحَافِظَ عَلَى صِحَّتِنَا.
sentences.translation: Moramo izbjegavati prekomjerno konzumiranje šećera kako bismo očuvali naše zdravlje.
sentences.translationEn: We must avoid eating too much sugar to maintain our health.
